C

Card - Class in com.example._0tazo.model
Represents a single playing card with a number, suit, face direction, and back color.
Card(String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
Constructs a new card face down with the given number, suit, and back color.
CardTest - Class in com.example._0tazo.model
Unit tests for Card.
CardTest() - Constructor for class com.example._0tazo.model.CardTest
 
cardValue - Variable in exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.SumExceededException
The value the offending card would have added.
checkCurrentPlayerElimination() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
Checks whether the current player has any legal move and eliminates them automatically if not.
chooseCard(int) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.ComputerPlayer
Selects the index of the best legal card to play given the current table sum.
chooseCard(int) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.HumanPlayer
Not used for the human player â€” card selection is handled by the UI controller via mouse click events on the hand cards.
chooseCard(int) - Method in interface com.example._0tazo.model.IPlayer
Chooses the hand index of the card to play given the current table sum.
com.example._0tazo - module com.example._0tazo
 
com.example._0tazo - package com.example._0tazo
 
com.example._0tazo.controller - package com.example._0tazo.controller
 
com.example._0tazo.model - package com.example._0tazo.model
 
com.example._0tazo.model.exception - package com.example._0tazo.model.exception
 
com.example._0tazo.utilities - package com.example._0tazo.utilities
 
com.example._0tazo.view - package com.example._0tazo.view
 
ComputerPlayer - Class in com.example._0tazo.model
Represents an AI-controlled player in the Cincuentazo card game.
ComputerPlayer(String) - Constructor for class com.example._0tazo.model.ComputerPlayer
Constructs a computer player with the given display name.
computerTakeTurn() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
Executes a full computer player turn automatically: chooses the best card, plays it, and draws a replacement card.
createCardView(Card, boolean, int, boolean) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
Creates an ImageView for the given card.
currentPlayer - Variable in exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.InvalidTurnException
Name of the player whose turn it actually is.
currentPlayerDrawCard() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
Makes the current player draw a card from the deck.
currentPlayerIndex - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
Index into players pointing to the current player.
currentSum - Variable in exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.SumExceededException
The table sum at the moment the violation was detected.
